name: SIGA TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: SIGA Technologies Inc is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company focused on health security. Its primary product is TPOXX (tecovirimat), an antiviral treatment for smallpox and related orthopoxvirus diseases. SIGA supplies TPOXX to the U.S. government under the BARDA Contract with the Biomedical Advanced Research and Development Authority, and also markets TPOXX internationally in the nascent biodefense market.
